common.name: Name
common.syncAllDoNotClose: Do not close this window while processing is in progress.
common.savedNoRegen: Changes saved. Lists will only be reprocessed on the next daily cron or by clicking "Reprocess all" in /lists.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.howToUseInfo: Register the URLs below in IPTV apps, Plex, Jellyfin and other players.
dashboard.noListsHint: Create your first filtered list to generate public URLs you can register in IPTV apps, Plex, Jellyfin and more.
dashboard.protectedHint: This list requires username and password (basic auth) when registered.
dashboard.copyHint: Click any field to copy its URL.
dashboard.iptvIntro: Works on TiviMate, IPTV Smarters, OTT Navigator, GSE Smart IPTV, Perfect Player and any app that accepts an M3U/M3U8 playlist.
dashboard.iptvStep1: In the app, choose to add a new M3U/M3U8 playlist.
dashboard.iptvStep2: Paste the list M3U8 URL into the playlist field.
dashboard.iptvStep3: For the program guide, paste the EPG URL (XMLTV) into the app EPG/XMLTV field.
dashboard.iptvStep4: If the list is protected, supply the user and password (basic auth) on the playlist screen.
dashboard.plexIntro: Plex DVR detects meowarr as an HDHomeRun tuner. Requires Plex Pass.
dashboard.plexStep1: Open Settings → Live TV & DVR → Set up Plex DVR in Plex Web.
dashboard.plexStep2: Choose the option to enter the address manually.
dashboard.plexStep3: Paste the list HDHR URL, Plex should detect the tuner and list the channels.
dashboard.plexStep4: When prompted for the guide, paste the per-list EPG guide URL (XMLTV). Without an attached EPG Plex cannot build the guide.
dashboard.plexNoEpgWarning: This list has no EPG attached. Edit the list and select an EPG so Plex can build the guide.
dashboard.plexAuthWarning: Plex and Jellyfin do not support basic auth on HDHR URLs. Remove protection from the list or use a proxy with an allowed IP.
dashboard.jellyfinIntro: Jellyfin treats meowarr as an HDHomeRun tuner under Live TV.
dashboard.jellyfinStep1: Dashboard → Live TV → Tuner Devices → Add and choose "HDHomeRun".
dashboard.jellyfinStep2: Paste the list HDHR URL into the Tuner URL field and save.
dashboard.jellyfinStep3: Under TV Guide Data Providers, add an XMLTV provider.
dashboard.jellyfinStep4: Paste the per-list EPG guide URL or the raw EPG URL (XMLTV) into the XMLTV URL field and save.
dashboard.jellyfinStep5: Go back to channels and map each channel to its guide program.
dashboard.playerIntro: On VLC, MPV, Kodi and other generic players, just open the list URL as a remote playlist.
dashboard.playerStep1: VLC: Media → Open Network Location → paste the M3U8 URL.
dashboard.playerStep2: MPV: run `mpv M3U8_URL` from the terminal, the player opens the first entry of the playlist.
dashboard.playerStep3: Kodi: install the PVR IPTV Simple Client add-on and configure the M3U8 URL and EPG URL (XMLTV) in the add-on settings.
dashboard.playerStep4: To play individual channels, open the list channels page, each row has a browser play button.

sources.title: Sources
sources.info: Upstream IPTV playlists (direct URL or Git). Channels are extracted on each sync and feed the filtered lists.

sourceEdit.title: Edit source
sourceEdit.info: Changing the URL/repository or kind clears cached channels and the local repo clone so the next sync starts fresh.
sourceEdit.locationHint: Direct URL: an .m3u/.m3u8 endpoint. Git: a clonable repository URL (https or ssh).

lists.title: Filtered lists
lists.info: Filter source channels and expose public m3u8 and HDHR URLs, optionally enriched by an EPG. Edits stay pending until the next daily cron or "Reprocess all".
lists.hdhrNoEpg: No EPG attached, set one in the list edit page to generate the XMLTV.
lists.regenDone: Lists reprocessed with all pending changes.

listEdit.title: Edit list
listEdit.info: Configure filtering, normalization and publishing. Without rule groups, every channel from the selected sources is delivered. Public URLs only update after the daily cron or "Reprocess all" in /lists.
listEdit.replacementsOrder: Applied in order to channel fields before rule groups, normalization and EPG matching. Use to clean prefixes/suffixes (e.g. remove "BR: " from display_name).
listEdit.noReplacementsHint: No replacements. Add one to rewrite fields before filtering.
listEdit.replacementRegexHint: Treat as regular expression (gi flags). Unchecked = literal case-insensitive text.
listEdit.rulesEvalOrder: Evaluated in order - the first matching group decides. Default = excluded.
listEdit.noGroupsHint: No groups. Without groups, the list returns all channels from the selected sources.
listEdit.groupNameTitle: GROUP name - becomes group-title for included channels
listEdit.appendQualityHint: Appends HD/SD/FHD/UHD/4K/H265/HEVC to group-title when detected

channels.infoSource: Raw channels from the last sync, with no filtering or normalization.
channels.infoList: Preview of what the list's public URL will serve after rules, normalization and EPG.
channels.searchPlaceholder: Search in tvg-id, tvg-name, name, group or URL…
channels.noneList: No channels - current list returns zero results. Check rules and sources.
channels.brokenOne: URL marked as broken and removed from public m3u8. Use the filter below to review and reactivate manually.
channels.brokenMany: URLs marked as broken and removed from public m3u8. Use the filter below to review and reactivate manually.
channels.testBtnHint: Tests every URL in this list directly from the browser. Broken ones are removed from the public m3u8.
channels.testWarning: Do not close this window or change page while the test is running. URLs are tested directly from this browser.
channels.testFailLoad: Failed to load list. Try again.
channels.confirmCancelTest: Cancel the test? Already submitted results will be kept.

epgs.title: EPG
epgs.info: XMLTV program guides. Attach to a list to enrich channels with tvg-id and schedules. Priorities force a match when the channel name doesn't.

epgEdit.title: Edit EPG
epgEdit.info: Changing the slug updates the public URL (/epg/{slug}.xml) and renames the local cache.

epgPriorities.title: EPG priorities - {name}
epgPriorities.info: Each priority forces a tvg-id when its rules match. Evaluated in order; the first match wins over the regular name match.
epgPriorities.saved: Priorities saved. Lists will only be reprocessed on the next daily cron or by clicking "Reprocess all" in /lists.
epgPriorities.noneHint: No priorities. Add one to force a tvg-id.
epgPriorities.tvgIdTitle: tvg-id from the EPG to force

images.title: Images
images.info: Overrides swap broken or outdated logos. They match by source URL or filters (display_name, group, etc.) and apply the target URL.
images.testBtnHint: Tests all images registered in the database directly from the browser
images.noOverrides: No overrides registered. Click an image in the gallery below to create one, or click New image.
images.targetBrokenTitle: Broken target, override will not be applied
images.noneBroken: No image found marked as broken.
images.noneFound: No image found in sources. Sync the sources first.
images.testWarning: Do not close this window or change page while the test is running. Images are loaded directly from this browser, and closing it interrupts the process.
images.testFailLoad: Failed to load list. Try again.
images.testNone: No image registered in the database.
images.confirmCancelTest: Cancel the test? Already submitted results will be kept.

imageEdit.saved: Saved. Lists will only be reprocessed on the next daily cron or by clicking "Reprocess all" in /lists.
imageEdit.filtersHint: The target image will be applied when the channel matches the source URL or any filter below.
imageEdit.noFiltersHint: No filter. Add one to match by display_name (e.g. contains "XYZ").

jobs.busyTooltip: Another job is already running. Wait for it to finish or cancel it.

errors.priorityRequiresRules: Priority {n}: at least one rule is required
